title: Aurora 33868 Soft Toy, Yellow, 13 cm
features: Introducing Ace Tennis Ball, the latest addition to Aurora's most popular Palm Pals Collection, is a soft and cuddly toy filled with beans that fit perfectly in your hand.

Palm Pals are soft and extremely touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. Ace Tennis Ball is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

This adorable Ace Tennis Ball soft toy comes under the Palm Pals sports collection. Palm Pals, our best-selling product range offers a variety of collections like Aquatic, Pets, Zoo, Craving and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Ace Tennis Ball measures 13cm. This soft toy is a great gift for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable, yellow-coloured mini-tennis-like soft toy with a smiling face. This is a hugely collectable range.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming black and white colour soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful soft toy and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
description: Product Description Introducing Ace Tennis Ball, the latest addition to Aurora's most popular Palm Pals Collection, is a soft and cuddly plush toy filled with beans that fit perfectly in your hand. Its yellow high-quality plush material makes it look like a cute tennis ball. Ace Tennis Ball is part of the Palm Pals Sports collection, which is just one of the many wonderful collections offered by Palm Pals like Aquatic, Pets, Zoo, Craving and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute. Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Ace Tennis Ball soft toy measures 13cm. These gorgeous and irresistibly cute toys make great gifts for any occasion whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable, yellow-coloured tennis-ball-like soft toy. This is a hugely collectable range. As part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, Ace Tennis Ball comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable and cloth labels are made from recycled materials. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience designing and manufacturing innovative, high-quality plush products Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
